title: Jalso: A Family Invitation
overview: Aastha return to her roots for a wedding, only to face love, judgment, and a shadow from her past. Amidst family, tradition, and turmoil, she find strength in bonds and faith in Dwarkadishji. Tale of heart, truth, finding one's voice-this is Jalso.
